summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Alixco Luxe e-commerce platform. Backend: 43/43 API tests passing (100%). Frontend: All pages, features, and integrations tested successfully. French language and FCFA formatting verified throughout.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/config returns brand='Alixco Luxe', whatsapp='2290197412933', currency='FCFA'
Backend: /api/categories lists all 6 seeded categories
Backend: /api/products lists 8 seeded products with filters (category, search, minPrice, maxPrice, sort, featured)
Backend: /api/products/{id} returns product detail
Backend: /api/services lists 6 seeded services
Backend: /api/auth/register creates customer, returns token
Backend: /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns token
Backend: /api/auth/me returns authenticated user
Backend: /api/auth/profile updates customer profile
Backend: /api/admin/login with admin@alixcoluxe.com / AlixcoAdmin2026! returns admin token
Backend: /api/admin/me requires admin role
Backend: /api/admin/products CRUD (create, update, delete)
Backend: /api/admin/services CRUD
Backend: /api/admin/categories CRUD
Backend: /api/admin/products/bulk-price applies percentage change (tested +10% and -10%)
Backend: /api/orders creates order (guest and authenticated), returns whatsappUrl with properly encoded message containing order number, items, total, customer details
Backend: /api/orders/mine returns customer's orders
Backend: /api/admin/orders lists all orders with optional status filter
Backend: /api/admin/orders/{id}/status updates order status (confirmed, in_production, shipped, delivered)
Backend: /api/admin/customers lists with ordersCount and totalSpent
Backend: /api/admin/dashboard returns KPIs, salesLast30Days (30 entries), topProducts, recentOrders, statusCounts
Frontend: Homepage renders hero with French text 'L'art de la personnalisation sur mesure'
Frontend: Homepage displays 6 categories grid (Accessoires, Bijoux personnalisés, Gravure bois, Gravure métal, Tableaux personnalisés, Vêtements personnalisés)
Frontend: Homepage displays featured products section
Frontend: Homepage displays services section 'Nos services'
Frontend: Homepage displays process steps (Choisissez, Personnalisez, Confirmez via WhatsApp)
Frontend: Catalog page renders with search input, sort dropdown, category filters, price slider
Frontend: Catalog search functionality works (tested with 'tableau')
Frontend: Product detail page renders with title, price in FCFA format with space separator (21 562 FCFA)
Frontend: Product detail page has personalization notes textarea
Frontend: Product detail page has add to cart button and WhatsApp button
Frontend: Services page renders 'Nos services' with 6 services and FCFA pricing
Frontend: Cart page shows empty state with 'Votre panier est vide' message
Frontend: Register page 'Créer un compte' with email, password, name, phone fields
Frontend: Login page 'Connexion' with email and password fields
Frontend: WhatsApp floating button visible (fixed position, green button in bottom right)
Frontend: Admin login successful with admin@alixcoluxe.com / AlixcoAdmin2026!
Frontend: Admin dashboard 'Tableau de bord' displays 4 KPIs (Chiffre d'affaires: 153 340 FCFA, Commandes totales: 4, En attente: 2, Clients: 1)
Frontend: Admin dashboard displays sales chart 'Ventes des 30 derniers jours' and status bar chart 'Commandes par statut'
Frontend: Admin dashboard displays top products and recent orders (4 orders: ALX-2026-00004, ALX-2026-00003, ALX-2026-00002, ALX-2026-00001)
Frontend: Admin products page displays table with 8 products, search input, 'Nouveau' button, 'Prix en masse' button
Frontend: Admin services page displays 6 services with FCFA pricing
Frontend: Admin categories page displays 6 categories with icons and descriptions
Frontend: Admin orders page displays 4 orders with search, status filter, and order details
Frontend: Admin customers page displays 1 customer with ordersCount and totalSpent (21 780 FCFA)
Frontend: FCFA formatting correct throughout with space separator (153 340 FCFA, 21 562 FCFA, 44 000 FCFA, etc.)
Frontend: French language 100% throughout (Tableau de bord, Produits, Services, Catégories, Commandes, Clients, etc.)

success_percentage.integration: 100% (WhatsApp URL generation, FCFA formatting, French language)
